name: MORE MORE JUMP!
description:
Congrats! After hard months worth of training under SKEnt. (SEKAI Entertainment), you now have the opportunity to become an idol! However, ONE strange thing is that you debuted under a pre-existing group, MORE MORE JUMP, instead of a new group, like you have dreamt of.

Airi Momoi Minori Hanasato Haruka Kiritani Shizuku Hinomori MORE MORE JUMP! Project SEKAI
creator: airimomoix0_
